test_plan.strategy: Unit tests prove the snapshot bug projection logic and alert compatibility because this feature is an in-process data-shape correction. Integration tests prove the projected shape survives collector/dashboard-style use and legacy BUGS.json fallback remains unchanged. Two e2e-labelled collector-flow tests validate the end-to-end data contract from snapshot-shaped input to Hub-facing project summary without adding UI scope.

test_cases.title: Snapshot bugs — preserves 12 total and zero active bugs
test_cases.given: snapshot={snapshotVersion:1, project:'AITRI-HUB', bugs:{total:12, open:0, blocking:0, bySeverity:{critical:0, high:0, medium:0, low:0}, openIds:[]}}
test_cases.then: result.bugsSummary has total=12, open=0, resolved=12, blocking=0, bySeverityActive.high=0, and openIds=[]
steps: Call projectFromSnapshot with the concrete snapshot
test_cases.expected_result: bugsSummary.total === 12; open === 0; resolved === 12; blocking === 0; bySeverityActive.high === 0; openIds.length === 0

test_cases.title: Snapshot bugs — preserves active severity buckets and IDs
test_cases.given: snapshot bugs={total:5, open:2, blocking:1, bySeverity:{critical:0, high:1, medium:1, low:0}, openIds:['BG-1','BG-2']}
test_cases.then: bugsSummary.total=5, open=2, blocking=1, bySeverityActive.high=1, bySeverityActive.medium=1, and openIds=['BG-1','BG-2']
steps: Assert active severity buckets and IDs

test_cases.title: Snapshot bugs — missing bugs object returns null summary
test_cases.given: snapshot={snapshotVersion:1, project:'NO-BUGS'} with no bugs field
test_cases.then: result.bugsSummary === null and no exception is thrown
steps: Call projectFromSnapshot with no bugs field

test_cases.title: Resolved bugs — total 5 minus open 2 equals 3
test_cases.given: snapshot bugs={total:5, open:2, blocking:0, bySeverity:{critical:0, high:0, medium:0, low:0}, openIds:['BG-1','BG-2']}

test_cases.title: Resolved bugs — total 12 minus open 0 equals 12
test_cases.given: snapshot bugs={total:12, open:0, blocking:0, bySeverity:{critical:0, high:0, medium:0, low:0}, openIds:[]}

test_cases.title: Resolved bugs — open greater than total clamps to zero
test_cases.given: snapshot bugs={total:1, open:3, blocking:0, bySeverity:{critical:0, high:0, medium:0, low:0}, openIds:['BG-1','BG-2','BG-3']}

test_cases.title: Active high bug — compatibility alias triggers blocking alert
test_cases.given: snapshot bugs={total:1, open:1, blocking:1, bySeverity:{critical:0, high:1, medium:0, low:0}, openIds:['BG-9']}
test_cases.when: projectFromSnapshot(snapshot).bugsSummary is passed into evaluateAlerts as project.bugsSummary
test_cases.then: evaluateAlerts returns one open-bugs alert with severity='blocking'
steps: Filter alerts where type includes open bugs
test_cases.expected_result: At least one bug alert has severity === 'blocking'

test_cases.title: Active medium bug — compatibility alias triggers warning alert
test_cases.given: snapshot bugs={total:1, open:1, blocking:0, bySeverity:{critical:0, high:0, medium:1, low:0}, openIds:['BG-10']}
test_cases.when: projected bugsSummary is evaluated by evaluateAlerts
test_cases.then: evaluateAlerts returns one open-bugs alert with severity='warning'
test_cases.expected_result: At least one bug alert has severity === 'warning'

test_cases.title: No active bugs — compatibility aliases remain zero and no bug alert appears
test_cases.given: snapshot bugs={total:12, open:0, blocking:0, bySeverity:{critical:0, high:0, medium:0, low:0}, openIds:[]}
test_cases.when: projected bugsSummary is evaluated by evaluateAlerts
test_cases.then: bugsSummary.high=0, bugsSummary.critical=0, and evaluateAlerts returns zero open-bugs alerts
test_cases.expected_result: No alert with type='open-bugs' is returned

test_cases.title: Snapshot history — exposes resolved without requiring verified
test_cases.given: snapshot bugs={total:12, open:0, blocking:0, bySeverity:{critical:0, high:0, medium:0, low:0}, openIds:[]} and no bugs.verified field

test_cases.title: Snapshot history — fixed and closed are not fabricated
test_cases.given: snapshot bugs={total:7, open:2, blocking:0, bySeverity:{critical:0, high:0, medium:2, low:0}, openIds:['BG-2','BG-3']} and no fixed or closed fields
test_cases.then: bugsSummary.resolved=5 and bugsSummary.fixed and bugsSummary.closed are undefined

test_cases.title: Snapshot history — invalid historical fields are ignored
test_cases.given: snapshot bugs={total:4, open:1, verified:99, fixed:88, closed:77, blocking:0, bySeverity:{critical:0, high:0, medium:1, low:0}, openIds:['BG-4']}
test_cases.then: bugsSummary.resolved=3 and bugsSummary.verified, fixed, and closed are not present
steps: Assert status-specific fields are not projected
test_cases.expected_result: Object.hasOwn(bugsSummary,'verified') === false; Object.hasOwn(bugsSummary,'fixed') === false; Object.hasOwn(bugsSummary,'closed') === false

test_cases.title: Legacy BUGS.json — existing status breakdown remains intact
preconditions: A temp project directory exists under os.tmpdir()
BUGS.json is written in the temp project root

test_cases.title: Legacy BUGS.json — artifactsDir=spec still works
preconditions: A temp project directory with spec/ subdirectory exists
steps: Create temp dir and spec subdir

test_cases.title: Legacy BUGS.json — absent file returns null
preconditions: A temp project directory exists and contains no BUGS.json
test_cases.then: the return value is exactly null

test_cases.title: Collector-facing snapshot projection — dashboard-ready summary contains total and resolved
preconditions: projectFromSnapshot is available to the collector
test_cases.given: snapshot project='AITRI-HUB' with bugs.total=12, bugs.open=0, bugs.blocking=0, bySeverity all zero, and openIds=[]
test_cases.when: projectFromSnapshot(snapshot) produces project data equivalent to the collector snapshot success path
test_cases.then: the projected project data has bugsSummary.total=12, bugsSummary.resolved=12, and bugsSummary.open=0

test_cases.title: Legacy fallback flow — BUGS.json summary remains available when snapshot is not used
preconditions: A temp legacy project is created under os.tmpdir() with BUGS.json
test_cases.when: readBugsSummary(tempDir, '') is used as the fallback bug source
test_cases.then: the fallback summary has open=1, high=1, and openIds=['BG-LEGACY']
